IGUI_perks_AppliedChemistry_Description: Knowledge of chemical processes and laboratory techniques. Higher levels unlock advanced synthesis recipes.
IGUI_perks_Applied_Chemistry_Description: Knowledge of chemical processes and laboratory techniques. Higher levels unlock advanced synthesis recipes.
IGUI_perks_Applied_Description: Knowledge of chemical processes and laboratory techniques. Higher levels unlock advanced synthesis recipes.
IGUI_PCP_Notice_Impurity_Subtitle: A one-time update to your world settings
IGUI_PCP_Notice_Impurity_WhatChangedBody: The Impurity System has been automatically enabled for this world. Previously, this setting defaulted to OFF. Starting with PCP v1.1, it now defaults to ON.
IGUI_PCP_Notice_Impurity_WhatPurityTitle: What does the purity system do?
IGUI_PCP_Notice_Impurity_WhatPurityBody1: Chemistry recipes now produce output with a purity rating (0-100%). The condition bar on chemistry items shows their purity - a full bar means high purity.
IGUI_PCP_Notice_Impurity_WhatPurityBody2: Better equipment produces purer results. Your Applied Chemistry skill now provides a purity bonus, giving skilled chemists a meaningful advantage. Impure reagents may reduce final product yields.
IGUI_PCP_Notice_Impurity_WhyBody: The purity system received significant improvements in v1.1 with proper skill integration, accurate input averaging, and a new Skill Purity Influence sandbox setting. We think it adds meaningful depth and progression to the chemistry experience.
IGUI_PCP_Notice_Impurity_SkillBody: A new sandbox option controls how much your Applied Chemistry skill affects output purity. Choose from None, Low, Standard, or High in the sandbox settings.
IGUI_PCP_Notice_Impurity_RevertBody: No problem! Open your Sandbox Settings, navigate to "Phobos' Industrial Pathways: Biomass", and set "Enable Impurity System" to OFF.
IGUI_PCP_Migrate_WarningFooter: One or more migrations did not complete as expected. Your save is not corrupted. Check the console log for details.
IGUI_PCP_Migrate_SuccessFooter: All migrations completed successfully. Enjoy your game!
IGUI_PCP_Reset_ConsoleHint: Check the console log (press ~ or F3) for full details.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_WhatAddsBody1: PCP adds real-world chemistry to Project Zomboid through 10 interconnected pathways: blackpowder, biodiesel, fat rendering, soap, bone char, salt extraction, recycling, agriculture, botanical processing, and horticulture.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_WhatAddsBody2: Everything you craft has a purity rating. Higher skill and better equipment produce purer products, which in turn yield better results when used as inputs in downstream recipes.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_WhatAddsBody3: New in v1.2: Process hemp into rope, cloth, canvas, paper, and medicine. Cure tobacco, roll cigarettes and cigars, craft glass pipes, and brew sugar syrup.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_WorkstationsIntro: Recipes are organised into four workstation tiers:
IGUI_PCP_Guide_FieldChemDesc: No special equipment needed. Campfires, basic tools. Great for getting started.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_KitchenChemDesc: Cooking pot required. Fat rendering, soap, bone char.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_LabChemDesc: ZVV chemistry set. Best purity, advanced reactions.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_IndustrialChemDesc: Concrete mixer (requires electricity). Bulk production at lower purity.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_PurityBody: The item condition bar doubles as a purity indicator. Sulphur powder at 75% condition means 75% purity.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_PurityBullet1: - Higher Applied Chemistry skill improves purity
IGUI_PCP_Guide_PurityBullet2: - Lab equipment (chemistry set) gives the best purity range
IGUI_PCP_Guide_PurityBullet3: - Kitchen and field methods give lower purity
IGUI_PCP_Guide_PurityBullet4: - Input purity affects output purity in multi-step chains
IGUI_PCP_Guide_Step1: 1. Find the Chemistry Pathways Handbook (found on bookshelves, in classrooms, and labs). Reading it unlocks the majority of recipes.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_Step2: 2. Start with Field Chemistry recipes. Crush charcoal, extract potash from ash, scavenge sulphur from matches.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_Step3: 3. Find a cooking pot for Kitchen Chemistry. Render animal fat, make soap, process bone char.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_Step4: 4. Locate a ZVV lab for Lab Chemistry. Synthesise sulphuric acid, potassium nitrate, and blackpowder at peak purity.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_SafetyIntro: Some recipes produce hazardous fumes. You will need:
IGUI_PCP_Guide_SafetyBullet1: - Gas mask or respirator for toxic recipes
IGUI_PCP_Guide_SafetyWarning: Without PPE, you may suffer adverse health effects (integrates with Extensive Health Rework if installed).
IGUI_PCP_Guide_CustomIntro: PCP has 19 sandbox options for fine-tuning difficulty:
IGUI_PCP_Guide_CustomBullet1: - Toggle the purity/impurity system on or off
IGUI_PCP_Guide_CustomBullet4: - Control concrete mixer fuel drain rate
IGUI_PCP_Guide_CustomInfo: Find them in Sandbox Options when creating a new game, under the Phobos Industrial Pathways section.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_Tip1: - Read the Chemistry Pathways Handbook to unlock the full recipe catalogue.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_Tip2: - High-purity inputs make high-purity outputs. Chain quality matters.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_Tip3: - The concrete mixer needs a generator (or grid power) to operate.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_Tip4: - Biodiesel can fuel generators and vehicles for full energy independence.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_Tip5: - Dynamic Trading vendors stock PCP items if that mod is installed.
IGUI_PCP_Guide_FooterWorkshop: Workshop: search Phobos Industrial Pathways Biomass
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_9_ModelsBody: All 118 items now display proper 3D models when placed on surfaces (ground, tables, shelves). Previously ~75 items showed oversized placeholder icons due to non-existent model references.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_9_CheeseclothBody: New item craftable on any loom from hemp bast fiber. Accepted as a filter in tincture, oil pressing, and salt extraction recipes alongside vanilla cheesecloth.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_9_RecipesBody: Fixed wildcard inputs on several recipes that incorrectly accepted any item. Press-dry hemp recipe now correctly outputs 1 dried bundle per craft.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_8_1_HempBody: Hemp retting and processing recipes now correctly accept harvested hemp bundles (fresh or dried) instead of the unobtainable HempBroken item. Wild hemp foraging also updated.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_8_SprayBody: Pest spray recipes now produce vanilla gardening sprays directly (Mildew Spray, Aphid Spray, Fly Spray). Existing custom sprays in your inventory are automatically converted. 3 custom items removed, recipes unchanged.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_8_HempBody: Charring hemp hurds no longer requires charcoal as fuel (was circular). Now uses propane, matching the Bone Char recipe pattern.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_8_IconsBody: 5 items that previously shared generic icons now have unique artwork.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_8_Stats1: 298 recipes | 118 items | 73 tradeable | 66 sandbox | 91 ZScience specimens
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_6_TransBody: All 9 translation files converted from Lua table format to flat JSON for PZ 42.15 compatibility. Minimum game version bumped to 42.15.0.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_6_Stats1: 301 recipes | 121 items | 76 tradeable | 66 sandbox | 91 ZScience specimens
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_5_ChewingBody: Chewing tobacco now uses a historically authentic recipe: mix dried tobacco with salt, sweetener, and alkali in water. Then choose your curing method — place on a heat source for instant fire-curing, or seal in a jar for 14 days of slow fermentation. Both paths produce the same chewing tobacco.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_5_TagsBody: 382 recipe inputs converted from long OR-lists to 4 registered custom tags (protective gloves, goggles, respirators, acid-resistant vessels). Recipes are cleaner and new PPE items are automatically recognised.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_5_SprayBody: Custom farming sprays now correctly appear in the Treat Problem right-click menu on crops (fixed in PhobosLib 1.18.1). Spray item tooltips rewritten in plain English to explain which crop problem each spray treats.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_5_Stats1: 301 recipes | 121 items | 76 tradeable | 66 sandbox | 91 ZScience specimens
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_4_MedicinalBody: Poultice and tincture now have timed application actions with visual and audio feedback. A new Medicated custom moodle (requires Moodle Framework mod) shows active medicinal status. Hemp product base effects doubled; new effects on decarbed buds and sugar syrup.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_4_FermentBody: Canned hemp buds now show a dynamic fermentation tooltip with curing progress (%) and estimated days remaining. A canning date stamp is recorded when you seal the jar and displayed in the tooltip.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_4_SandboxBody: 33 new sandbox options on the PCP_HempEffects settings page. Tune individual stat effects for pipes, cigars, cigarettes, decarbed buds, poultice, tincture, and sugar syrup. Moodle duration controls for medicinal and recreational products.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_4_BugfixBody: Fixed cigar recipe (now uses tobacco leaves + sugar with partial sugar consumption). Horticulture migration is now re-runnable. Fixed RuntimeException in drainable item migration.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_3_HempBody: 6 new recipes using vanilla crafting stations: press seed oil on the Hand Press, make oakum and sew sacks on the Loom, knot fishing nets and tie sheet ropes by hand, and craft hemp snare traps. Seed Press Cake byproduct from oil extraction.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_3_HazardBody: New Safe/Unsafe variants for botanical processing: hemp hurd charring (open fire, coke oven, simple), bast fiber extraction, hemp cloth weaving, and hempcrete mixing. Smoke inhalation and mineral dust exposure with light PPE requirements.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_3_AuditBody: Full B42 distribution pass for all new items. 26 new ZScience specimens. Skill book coverage audit — all recipes now learnable from books. Doctor XP fix. Hand Press fluid output bug fix.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_3_Stats1: 6 new recipes, 6 new items, 10 botanical hazard variants
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_2_BotanicalBody: 30 recipes for processing raw hemp into rope, twine, cloth, canvas, paper, poultice, tincture, and hempcrete. Full purity propagation across all chains. Caustic retting now has Safe/Unsafe hazard variants with PPE requirements.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_2_HorticultureTitl: > Horticulture: Tobacco, Hemp Buds, Papermaking & Smoking
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_2_HorticultureBody: 29 new recipes: cure and can hemp buds, pack chewing tobacco, roll cigarettes and cigars, craft glass smoking pipes, forge mould-and-deckle for papermaking, and brew sugar syrup. 31 new items.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_2_SoftDepBody: 20 new items registered with Dynamic Trading vendors. 13 botanical specimens added to ZScienceSkill microscope research. Horticulture items spawn in world containers.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_2_Stats1: 59 new recipes, 44 new items, 12 hazard variants
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_2_RebrandBody: This mod was formerly known as "Phobos' Chemistry Pathways". It has been renamed to "Phobos' Industrial Pathways: Biomass" as part of a new thematic mod series. This is a display-name-only change — your saves, items, and settings are completely unaffected.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_1_Title: > Skill Purity Influence + Impurity System Default
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_1_Body: New sandbox option: Skill Purity Influence (None/Low/Standard/High) controls how much Applied Chemistry skill affects output purity. The Impurity System now defaults to ON for new worlds, with an automatic one-time migration for existing saves.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_0_BreakingTitle: > BREAKING: Dependency changed to Zombie Virus Vaccine
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_0_BreakingBody: PCP now requires Zombie Virus Vaccine (ZVV) instead of zReVaccin 3. All lab equipment references have been updated. You can unsubscribe from zReVaccin 3 after this update.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V1_0_MigrationBody: Existing saves automatically convert any orphaned zReVaccin lab items (flasks, NaOH bags, H2SO4 cans, corks, gloves) to their ZVV or vanilla equivalents. Condition and fluid contents are preserved.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_26_Title: > Heat Gating Fix + Empty Container Fix
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_26_Body: 23 hotFluidContainer recipes fixed: heat check now tests the correct vessel (the pot on the stove, not the water source). Empty FluidContainers no longer show (Worn) after draining.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_25_Title: > Salt Extraction Pathway + B42 Fluid Syntax
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_25_Body: 6 new recipes: collect brine from water wells, concentrate, crystallize, and purify into table salt. All 133 FluidContainer recipe inputs converted to B42 native fluid syntax.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_25_Stats1: 4 new items, 1 new fluid (Brine), 204 recipes total
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_24_Body: New players now see a Quick Guide introducing PCP's mechanics, crafting tiers, and purity system on first game start. Returning players see this What's New window after each minor or major version update. Both popups are powered by a new generic PhobosLib popup system.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_24_BugTitle: > Bug Fix: Mixer Item IDs + Input Ordering
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_24_BugBody: Fixed invalid item references and input ordering in mixer recipes that caused Java exceptions at world load.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_23_Body: The decorative concrete mixer is now a powered CraftBench workstation requiring electricity (generator or grid power). 13 new recipes: 6 construction mixes (concrete, clay cement, mortar, stucco, reinforced concrete, fireclay) and 6 bulk chemistry alternatives (blackpowder, biodiesel, soap, compost, plaster, wood vinegar) at lower purity than lab synthesis. Build your own mixer with Metalworking 4.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_23_Stats1: 4 new items: MortarMix, StuccoMix, ReinforcedConcrete, Fireclay
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_23_Stats2: 3 new sandbox options for mixer configuration
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_23_Stats4: Generator fuel drain proportional to recipe duration
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_22_Body: Major content expansion: agriculture recipes (composting, wood vinegar distillation, chemical tanning, farming sprays), water purification, fire-starting reagents, leather tanning. New hazard/DT fixes, farming spray integration.
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_22_Stats2: PhobosLib tooltip nil guards and farming spray module
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_21_Stats2: Vessel replacement system for empty FluidContainers
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_21_Stats3: LazyStamp system for container-opening purity stamping
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_V0_21_Stats4: Purity tooltip with quality tier display
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_Earlier_Stats2: v0.18: First migration system, recipe filter hooks
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_Earlier_Stats3: v0.17 and earlier: Core chemistry pathways, item definitions
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_FooterWorkshop: Workshop: search Phobos Industrial Pathways Biomass
IGUI_PCP_Changelog_FooterFeedback: Bug reports and feedback welcome in the Workshop comments.
IGUI_PCP_Tooltip_SeedPressCake: Compressed seed residue from oil pressing. Rich in nitrogen — useful as compost or fertiliser.
IGUI_PCP_Tooltip_HempSack: A sturdy woven sack stitched from hemp canvas. Worn on the back for extra carrying capacity.
IGUI_PCP_Tooltip_Oakum: Loose hemp fibre soaked in wood tar. Used historically for caulking and waterproofing — also makes effective tinder.
IGUI_PCP_Tooltip_HempFishingNet: A hand-knotted fishing net woven from hemp twine. Functions identically to a standard net.
IGUI_PCP_Tooltip_HempSheetRope: A hemp rope reinforced with cloth strips. Can be attached to windows for escape.
IGUI_PCP_Tooltip_HempSnare: A simple loop snare fashioned from hemp twine and a stick. Set near animal paths to catch small game.
